title: SQL: exp_bin: Assertion `0'
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (id INTEGER IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, kvks INTEGER NOT NULL, value VARCHAR(255));

SELECT COUNT(kvks) FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY k1.kvks) AS rn, k1.kvks AS t1, k2.kvks AS t2 FROM test AS k1 JOIN test AS k2 ON (k1.id + 1) = k2.id WHERE (k1.kvks + 1000) < k2.kvks) AS x1 JOIN (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY k1.kvks) AS rn, k1.kvks AS t1, k2.kvks AS t2 FROM test AS k1 JOIN test AS k2 ON (k1.id + 1) = k2.id WHERE (k1.kvks + 1000) < k2.kvks) AS x2 ON (x2.rn + 1) = x1.rn;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test WHERE kvks IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Count with complex subquery on sequential IDs
